CustomField.description: Effective Rate is automatically populated by the system based on the Rate from the respective period's Rate Schedule. If Threshold Units and a Threshold Rate are configured, the Effective Rate will be updated accordingly. Although this is system-calculated, the field is editable to allow users to override the value if needed. The final Effective Rate entered here will update the Total MR and will be displayed on the invoice.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Effective Rate is automatically populated by the system based on the Rate from the respective period's Rate Schedule. If Threshold Units and a Threshold Rate are configured, the Effective Rate will be updated accordingly. Although this is system-calculated, the field is editable to allow users to override the value if needed. The final Effective Rate entered here will update the Total MR and will be displayed on the invoice.
CustomField.label: Effective Rate
